title: Fix HTTP credentials passing
body:
This primarily fixes the incorrect normalization added in #11430 .

<s>That requires UNMERGED https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1373 </s>

<s>Separately I abuse this PR for testing UNMERGED and mostly unrelated https://github.com/containers/common/pull/763 .</s>

Also, this adds a lot of unit tests to the HTTP credential passing code, and proposes a fairly significant WIP refactoring. <s>Still outstanding:
- Remove unnecessary/redundant parameters to `auth.Make…Header` (at the very least don’t modify caller’s `SystemContext`)
- Split `auth.MakeXRegistryAuthHeader` yet further into two, to emphasize the exclusive sets of parameters instead of pretending to handle both.
</s>

See individual commit messages for details.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mtrmac* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

NOTE: The comments in the pkg/auth package talk about the AuthHeader using multiple values and ConfigHeader using a map, but the actual code supports multiple header values the other way around. Which one is correct? I’ve been assuming it’s the code.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.

OK, rebased and enough with the refactoring.

The PR now contains a fairly extensive refactoring of `pkg/auth`:
- Restructure to make it easier to unit-test, and add those tests
- (Actually fix the credential passing)
- Refactor the external API to simplify and avoid surprising aspects.

Some parts of the above, especially of the refactor, might not be ideal, or might be actively unwanted based on concerns I’m not aware of. Please don’t hesitate to say so, I’d be happy to split this into multiple PRs, drop parts entirely, or change in any other way requested.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Ready for review now. Again, if you don’t want all of the refactoring, I’m happy to drop any part.
The “list image” failures are likely related to https://github.com/containers/common/pull/847 / https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11905 .

> The “list image” failures are likely related to [containers/common#847](https://github.com/containers/common/pull/847) / #11905 .

Apologies for breaking, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12514 is taking care of that.
